title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 300.140 - Obedience to traffic control devices
text:
300.140.  Obedience to traffic control devices. — The driver of any vehicle shall obey the instructions of any official traffic control device applicable thereto placed in accordance with the provisions of this ordinance, unless otherwise directed by a traffic or police officer, subject to the exceptions granted the driver of an authorized emergency vehicle in this ordinance.
(L. 1965 p. 445 § 28)
